creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Sat Mar  2 16:51:44 2013
New Revision: 313279
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313279

Log:
  - Update MASTER_SITES
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		176360
  Submitted by:	Javad Kouhi <javad.kouhi@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/x11-fonts/farsifonts/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/x11-fonts/farsifonts/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-fonts/farsifonts/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 16:50:53 2013	(r313278)
+++ head/x11-fonts/farsifonts/Makefile	Sat Mar  2 16:51:44 2013	(r313279)
@@ -9,10 +9,9 @@ PORTNAME=	farsifonts
 PORTVERSION=	0.4
 PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	x11-fonts
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.unixified.net/distfiles/ \
-		http://www.farsiweb.info/font/
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/farsi-fonts/
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	javad.kouhi@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Standard set of Unicode Persian fonts
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	ttmkfdir:${PORTSDIR}/x11-fonts/ttmkfdir
